description: Operative target list for pcc-network-kit sync (read by pcc-sync.mjs + the Action). PUBLIC, NON-FORK LamaSu repos only. Forks are excluded on purpose: a PR on a fork targets its UPSTREAM project, which would spam unrelated repos. Private repos are opt-in — add deliberately. Regenerate with: gh repo list LamaSu --json name,visibility,isFork.
